task: Add a preview-only worker result dry-run slice for the Pro Rust product core: use the existing local event replay as input, expose a keyless API endpoint that returns proposed worker result commit steps without executing providers or writing result events, render a compact result dry-run panel in the graph-first web shell, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Keep this local-only and keyless: do not add Postgres/Redis, hosted auth, real workers, provider execution, credential access, quota/billing mutation, OSS runtime changes, npm dependencies, package publishing, or live provider calls.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
